contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 40
- Description: Edgar->dao_protocol PR5 ramp: flip /dao/submit_contribution (write path) to Python
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1068
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol/pull/38
  
  Details:
  Ramped PR5 of the Edgar -> dao_protocol migration: /dao/submit_contribution (the signed-contribution write path) now proxies to the dao_protocol FastAPI service (:8010). Used an EXACT-match nginx location (not a prefix flip) because Rails serves many other /dao/* routes (cypher, canvas, check_digital_signature, etc.) that are NOT ported -- a prefix flip would have 404-ed them. Verified the path moved (GET -> FastAPI 405, journal-confirmed) and siblings stayed on Rails (/dao/cypher 301, /dao/check_digital_signature 401). CORS already covered by dao_protocol#44. This very contribution submission is the dogfood: a signed [CONTRIBUTION] event exercises verify + dedup + Telegram Chat Logs append (no ledger webhook dispatched for this event type). Live conf mirrored to sentiment_importer#1068. Rollback = drop the exact-match location block + reload. 4 of 6 routes now ramped (PR2/PR3/PR4/PR5); remaining PR6 (qr-code-check + stripe order_sync).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 66.67
